package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadLogFieldsBuiltBeforeLevelCheck() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_log_fields_built_before_level_check"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag expensive log field construction before checking whether the level is enabled."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
